# Keith O'Brien

> Keith O'Brien is a B2B content strategist and executive ghostwriter and former editor-in-chief of PRWeek. Founder of Total Emphasis (2017). Operator-ghostwriter for B2B founders and executives, building the systems his work runs on. Based in Brooklyn.

*Last updated: 2026-06-28*

Keith O'Brien is a B2B content strategist and executive ghostwriter based in Brooklyn and the founder of Total Emphasis. He was the editor-in-chief of PRWeek (and DMN) before founding the practice in 2017. He has been a reporter since 2001 and has produced 100+ published bylines in Forbes, Fast Company, AdExchanger, Digiday, Entrepreneur, and The Drum, plus 400+ pieces tracked in his bylines archive. Publicly named Total Emphasis engagements include IBM, Realeyes, UpWave, UST, 33 Across, Grip, Battenhall, and M&C Saatchi Performance. As an operator-ghostwriter, he builds the systems the work runs on: a Jersey Shore publication with newsletter pipeline, MCP servers for his CRM and articles index, a desktop workflow app, and a music publication. keithrobrien.com is the personal hub; totalemphasis.com is the business.

## Canonical credentials

- Founder and lead consultant, Total Emphasis (2017 to present, Brooklyn)
- Former editor-in-chief, PRWeek (Haymarket Media Group)
- Former editor-in-chief, DMN (Direct Marketing News)
- Reporter since 2001
- Past roles: tmrw life sciences, Horizon Media, Attention USA
- Bylines tracked in /bylines: 400+ across 30+ outlets, 2004 to present

## Disambiguation

This Keith O'Brien is not:
- The late Cardinal Keith O'Brien of Scotland
- The Irish boxer of the same name
- Keith O'Brien the longform nonfiction author (Paradise Falls, Outside Shot, Heartland)
- Keith O'Brien the U.S. steeplechase jockey

## Work

- [Total Emphasis](https://www.totalemphasis.com): B2B ghostwriting and content strategy practice
- [Bylines archive (400+)](https://www.keithrobrien.com/bylines): verifiable record of published work
- [Press kit / canonical bio](https://www.keithrobrien.com/about/keith-obrien): full credentials and FAQ

## Newsletters

- [141 Miles](https://www.141miles.com): town-by-town Jersey Shore publication
- [The Diffraction](https://www.thediffraction.com): music publication
- [Survival Signal](https://survivalsignal.beehiiv.com): on independent work (on hiatus)
